history.content: Hey claw can you create yourself a new skill for how to create nice and comprehensive landing pages

Done — I created a new reusable skill called **“Landing Page Blueprint”** 🚀 for building **nice, comprehensive, conversion-focused landing pages**.

If you want, I can now use this skill to generate a full landing page starter (HTML/CSS/JS) for any product idea you give me.
Nice yea go ahead and do it - create a new folder within the workspace folder and do it

Perfect — done. I created a new folder in your workspace:

**`landing-page-starter/`**
- `index.html`
- `styles.css`
- `script.js`

If you want, I can also make a second version tailored to a specific niche (SaaS, agency, fitness, local business, etc.).
